name: feasytools

metadata.name: feasytools
metadata.summary: A set of tools for data processing, including Time Function, Table, Priority Queue, Range List, etc.

documentation:
# FEasyTools: Some useful components
- dprov: Data provider as time functions
- argchk: Argument parser with type checking
- table: Table helper for the CSV, SDT & SDT.GZ format, and their reader and writer.
- pq: Heap, priority queue & buffered priority queue
- rangelist: An xml reader for a time range list

methods.name: feasytools.rangelist.RangeList.parse_time
documentation: hh:mm:ss / str -> int

documentation: 入堆, O(log n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.Heap.pop
documentation: 弹出堆顶元素, O(log n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.Heap.remove
documentation: 弹出item元素, O(n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.Heap.top
documentation: 获取堆顶元素，但不弹出, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.Heap.__contains__
documentation: 检查元素是否存在, O(n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.Heap.empty
documentation: 检测堆是否为空, O(1)
小根堆数据结构

classes.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.push
documentation:
入队, O(log n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.pop
documentation: 获取队首元素并出队, O(log n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.remove
documentation: 弹出第一个item元素, O(n), 返回是否成功

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.top
documentation: 获取队首元素，但不出队, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.empty
documentation: 检测队列是否为空, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.PQueue.__str__
documentation: 转为字符串, O(nlogn)
优先级队列（小根堆数据结构）

documentation: 获取优先级区大小

documentation: 检查缓冲区长度, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.__contains__
documentation: 检查元素是否存在, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.push
documentation:
入队, O(log n)
    pri: 优先级
    item: 元素

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.top
documentation: 获取队首元素，但不出队, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.pop
documentation: 获取队首元素并出队, O(log n)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.empty
documentation: 检测队列是否为空, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.remove
documentation: 弹出第一个obj元素, O(n+m), 返回是否成功

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.p_has
documentation: 检查元素是否存在于优先级区, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.q_has
documentation: 检查元素是否存在于缓冲区, O(1)

methods.name: feasytools.pq.BufferedPQ.__str__
documentation: 转为字符串, O(nlogn+m)

含有缓冲的优先级队列。
该数据结构分为两部分，一个普通队列(记为q)和一个优先级队列(记为p)。
优先级队列大小恒定(设大小为n)，普通队列大小可变(设大小为m)。
数据进入普通队列，而后进入优先级队列，最后离开本结构。

classes.name: feasytools.table.ReadOnlyTable

methods.name: feasytools.table.ReadOnlyTable.__init__
documentation: 使用MemoryTableReader初始化

methods.name: feasytools.table.ReadOnlyTable.__init__
documentation: 使用MemoryTableWriter初始化

methods.name: feasytools.table.ReadOnlyTable.__init__
documentation:
初始化
    fname: 数据表文件名, 仅支持csv, sdt和sdt.gz文件.
    dtype: 表格数据类型, 只有csv文件需要提供此项.
    preload: 是否在初始化时预加载全部数据.

注意: 
    预加载使得初始化速度大幅降低, 但大幅提升了运行时性能.
    csv强制开启预加载功能, sdt和sdt.gz自选(推荐sdt.gz开启, sdt关闭).
    如果数据过大导致内存不足, 请勿使用预加载功能.

class_variables.name: feasytools.table.ReadOnlyTable._d
documentation: type: ignore

**只读**数据表, 表中所有数据必须是同一类型, 必须是32位int或float格式.
某一行的内容直接用下标获取; 某一列的内容用col方法获取.
由于是只读列表，因此必须从文件加载. 支持的文件类型包含csv, sdt和sdt.gz.

modules.name: feasytools.argchk
documentation: ArgChecker: A simple tool for parsing command line arguments with type checking and error handling

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_dict
documentation: Return the input parameters as a dict

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_bool
documentation: Pop a boolean value from the argument list. If the key exists, return True; otherwise, return False.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_bool
documentation: Get a boolean value from the argument list.If the key exists, return True; otherwise, return False.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_int
documentation:
Pop an integer value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_int
documentation:
Get an integer value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_int_or_none
documentation: Pop an integer value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_int_or_none
documentation: Get an integer value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_str
documentation:
Pop a string value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_str
documentation:
Get a string value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_str_or_none
documentation: Pop a string value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_str_or_none
documentation: Get a string value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_float
documentation:
Pop a float value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_float
documentation:
Get a float value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.
If the default value is None, raise an error.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.pop_float_or_none
documentation: Pop a float value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.get_float_or_none
documentation: Get a float value from the argument list. If the key does not exist, return the default value.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.empty
documentation: Return whether the argument list is empty.

methods.name: feasytools.argchk.ArgChecker.to_dict
documentation: Return the argument list as a dictionary (Shallow copy).
